description_long: This is a pair of open-toe sandals featuring a wooden-textured footbed and a wide black strap across the top, secured with visible brown fasteners. The sandals have a thong-style toe separator, also black, with yellow stitching detail for added visual interest. The footbed appears smooth and slightly contoured for comfort, while the sole is black and likely made of a grippy material for traction. The overall design is minimalistic yet stylish, suitable for casual urban wear. The materials and construction suggest durability and comfort for walking on city streets or sidewalks.
description: A pair of open-toe sandals with a wooden-textured footbed, black straps, and thong-style separators, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, black straps, and central thong separators.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sandal's profile, the thickness of the sole, and the yellow stitching on the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth wooden-textured footbed and the open heel area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the strap attachment and the contoured footbed.
